# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  - name: spName
    type: string
    defaultValue: "CI/CD Service Principal"
  - name: appId
    type: string
  - name: password
    type: secureString
  - name: tenantId
    type: string

variables:
  - name: subscriptionId
    defaultValue: "[subscription().subscriptionId]"
  - name: spObjectId
    defaultValue: "[concat(resourceGroup().id, '/providers/Microsoft.AAD/servicePrincipals/', parameters('spName'))]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2015-07-01
    name: "[guid(concat(parameters('spObjectId'),'contributor'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c" # Contributor
      principalId: "[parameters('spObjectId')]"
    dependsOn:
    - Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/readWriteStorageRoleAssignment
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2015-07-01
    name: "[guid(concat(parameters('spObjectId'),'readWriteStorage'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/d87e6730-3cef-45a3-b102-67ab3ac28d7b" # Storage Blob Data Contributor
      principalId: "[parameters('spObjectId')]"
    dependsOn:
    - Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/readWriteStorageRoleAssignment
